# Synergy Plugin Market Registry

> This repository is the official GitHub-backed Synergy Plugin Market index. It is for registering reviewed plugin release artifacts, not for developing Synergy core.

## If You Are Publishing A Plugin

- Read [README.md](README.md) for the registry model and artifact requirements.
- Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for the PR workflow and review criteria.
- Prefer running this from the plugin repository:

```bash
synergy-plugin publish-market --repo https://github.com/owner/my-plugin
```

The command prepares the GitHub Release assets, writes `plugins/<plugin-id>.json`, regenerates `registry.json`, validates this registry, and opens or prepares a pull request.

## Registry Requirements

- `plugins/<plugin-id>.json` is the source of truth for a plugin detail entry.
- `registry.json` is generated from `plugins/*.json`; do not hand-edit it except through `bun run build-registry`.
- Every version must point to an installable `.synergy-plugin.tgz`, a matching `.sig`, a `sha256-...` integrity value, and `signature.signer`.
- CI verifies the artifact, manifest identity, permission hashes, and Ed25519 signature using the registry-reviewed signer.

## Not For Synergy Source Development

Do not use this repository's docs as Synergy source-development instructions. To change Synergy itself, use the main Synergy repository and its `AGENTS.md`.
